# FlipMyCase

> Free browser-based text conversion, formatting, analysis, encoding, and developer utilities. Tool input is processed on the visitor's device.

## Core tools
- [Text Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/): Convert text among uppercase, lowercase, title case, sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, and kebab-case
- [All Tools](https://flipmycase.com/tools): Browse the currently available utilities by category
- [Text Cleaner](https://flipmycase.com/text-cleaner): Remove extra spaces, line breaks, tabs, and hidden characters
- [Word Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, and reading time
- [JSON Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/json-formatter): Format, validate, and minify JSON in the browser
- [CSV to JSON](https://flipmycase.com/csv-to-json): Convert between CSV and JSON locally
- [Text Diff](https://flipmycase.com/text-diff): Compare two text blocks and highlight changes
- [Regex Tester](https://flipmycase.com/regex-tester): Test patterns and replacements against local text
- [Password Generator](https://flipmycase.com/password-generator): Generate random passwords locally using browser cryptography
- [Hash Generator](https://flipmycase.com/hash-generator): Generate common hashes from text or files in the browser

## Reference and trust pages
- [Learn Text Formats](https://flipmycase.com/learn): Explain common text-case formats and when to use them
- [About](https://flipmycase.com/about): Who operates the tools and how they are built
- [Privacy Policy](https://flipmycase.com/privacy): Browser-local processing, hosting logs, and current tracking status
- [Accessibility](https://flipmycase.com/accessibility): Accessibility commitments and contact information
- [Terms](https://flipmycase.com/terms): Service limitations and acceptable use

## Important limitations
- Browser-local processing does not make a device or browser extension inherently secure.
- Results should be reviewed before use in production code, legal documents, or security-sensitive workflows.
- Google AdSense, Google Analytics, and Microsoft Clarity are currently disabled.
- The former scaled article archive is not part of the reviewed public site.
